pr.title: Render order list
pr.description: Builds a list of order summaries.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+def summarize(orders):
+    rows = []
+    for order in orders:
+        rows.append(order.customer.fetch().name)
+    return rows
+

planted_defects.description: N+1 query: order.customer.fetch() runs a separate database query on every loop iteration instead of batching or eager-loading customers.
